mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.type, l.operate, l.status, l.ip_address, l.details, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.period) * 1000 as period, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.operation_time) * 1000 as operate_time, CASE WHEN l.type = 0 THEN ar.username WHEN l.type = 1 THEN rr.username ELSE NULL END as username, CASE WHEN l.type = 0 THEN '管理员' WHEN l.type = 1 THEN '检修员' ELSE '-' END as user_type_text, CASE WHEN l.status = 0 THEN '成功' WHEN l.status = 1 THEN '失败' WHEN l.status = 2 THEN '告警' WHEN l.status = 3 THEN '调试' ELSE '-' END as status_text FROM ( SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.type, l.operate, l.status, l.ip_address, l.details, l.period, l.operation_time FROM log l
AND ( (l.type = 0) OR (l.type = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM repairman r WHERE r.id = l.user_id AND ( (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND r.area_id BETWEEN #{request.areaId} AND #{request.areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{request.areaId}, 100) = 0 AND r.area_id BETWEEN #{request.areaId} AND #{request.areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 100) != 0 AND r.area_id = #{request.areaId}) ) )) )
AND l.type = #{request.type}
AND l.status = #{request.status}
AND l.operation_time >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{request.operationTimeMin} / 1000)
AND l.operation_time <= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{request.operationTimeMax} / 1000)
ORDER BY l.operation_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) l LEFT JOIN admin_registration ar ON l.user_id = ar.id AND l.type = 0 LEFT JOIN repairman_registration rr ON l.user_id = rr.id AND l.type = 1

choose.when: SELECT username FROM admin_registration WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT username FROM repairman_registration WHERE id = #{userId}

mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.type, l.operate, l.status, l.ip_address, l.details, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.period) * 1000 as period, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.operation_time) * 1000 as operate_time, CASE WHEN l.type = 0 THEN ar.username WHEN l.type = 1 THEN rr.username ELSE NULL END as username, CASE WHEN l.type = 0 THEN '管理员' WHEN l.type = 1 THEN '检修员' ELSE '-' END as user_type_text, CASE WHEN l.status = 0 THEN '成功' WHEN l.status = 1 THEN '失败' WHEN l.status = 2 THEN '告警' WHEN l.status = 3 THEN '调试' ELSE '-' END as status_text FROM log l LEFT JOIN admin_registration ar ON l.user_id = ar.id AND l.type = 0 LEFT JOIN repairman_registration rr ON l.user_id = rr.id AND l.type = 1 WHERE l.id = #{id}

SELECT s.debugging_count AS debugging, s.error_count AS error, s.total_count AS `all`, s.total_count AS total, s.success_count AS success, s.error_count AS failed, COALESCE(ROUND(s.period_sum / NULLIF(s.total_count, 0)), 0) AS avg_duration, COALESCE(d.total_count, 0) AS today, s.warning_count AS warning FROM log_indicator_summary s LEFT JOIN log_daily_summary d ON d.stat_date = CURDATE() WHERE s.id = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS `all`, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success, SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error, SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning, SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS debugging, SUM(CASE WHEN l.operation_time >= CURDATE() AND l.operation_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(l.period, 0))), 0) AS avg_duration FROM log l
AND ( (l.type = 0) OR (l.type = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM repairman r WHERE r.id = l.user_id AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND r.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND r.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND r.area_id = #{areaId}) ) )) )
